case_title: DANIEL ROBERTS RESPONDENT VS. CHI NGAI LAU APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2004 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 7, 2004 BY JOHN BICKEL. JOHN BICKEL, JUDGE PRO TEM. G. PEERLESS, CLK.
ORDER STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT LAU, CHI NGAI RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ROBERTS, DANIEL $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $89.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT - JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDA/RESPONDENT CHI NGAI LAU FOR $2,500.00 & $22.00 IN COSTS RENDERED ON APRIL 12, 2004 STANDS. JUDGMENT ON CROSS- COMPLAINT IS ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT/RESPONDENT AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. CROSS-COMPLAINANT/APPELLANT DANIEL ROBERTS FOR $89.00; SAID CROSS-COMPLAINANT DANIEL ROBERTS SHALL RECOVER NOTHING ON SAID CROSS-COMPLAINT.
